summary: A superb recording that captures the best performance of June 12th with vivid, immersive sound.
review: The reviewer, who attended all three nights, hails this as the definitive version of the June 12 show, describing it as the finest and feeling like they’re back on stage in front of Jerry. The listening experience is described as highly immersive, suggesting excellent audio fidelity despite no explicit technical details.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review emphasizes both an outstanding performance and an immersive listening experience, indicating a top‑tier show with excellent recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer feels "like I'm there again," implying clear, detailed sound that captures the live atmosphere.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as the best of three consecutive shows, suggesting a consistently strong set and overall flow.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Reviewer was "right in front of Jerry suckin it up," indicating a particularly engaging performance from Garcia.
